# Only source this once.
if [ -n "$__HM_SESS_VARS_SOURCED" ]; then return; fi
export __HM_SESS_VARS_SOURCED=1

export EDITOR="nvim"
export GNUPGHOME="/home/user/.gnupg"
export GTK2_RC_FILES="/home/user/.gtkrc-2.0"
export JAVA_HOME="/nix/store/l5z1hqq6l223379w6f25fibniz16g2s9-openjdk-21.0.9+8/lib/openjdk"
export LESSOPEN="|/nix/store/qqbjg2zx76xhl356d4bb5yshaksf38pi-lesspipe-2.20/bin/lesspipe.sh %s"
export LOCALE_ARCHIVE_2_27="/nix/store/7l6arlis4halhgnkw2mp5v4rsf2z3f1g-glibc-locales-2.40-66/lib/locale/locale-archive"
export MCFLY_INTERFACE_VIEW="TOP"
export MCFLY_KEY_SCHEME="emacs"
export NIXOS_OZONE_WL="1"
export NIXPKGS_ALLOW_UNFREE="1"
export NIX_XDG_DESKTOP_PORTAL_DIR="/etc/profiles/per-user/user/share/xdg-desktop-portal/portals"
export PASSWORD_STORE_DIR="$XDG_DATA_HOME/password-store"
export STARSHIP_CONFIG="/home/user/.config/starship.toml"
export TMUX_TMPDIR="${XDG_RUNTIME_DIR:-"/run/user/$(id -u)"}"
export XDG_CACHE_HOME="/home/user/.cache"
export XDG_CONFIG_HOME="/home/user/.config"
export XDG_DATA_HOME="/home/user/.local/share"
export XDG_DESKTOP_DIR="/home/user/Desktop"
export XDG_DOCUMENTS_DIR="/home/user/Documents"
export XDG_DOWNLOAD_DIR="/home/user/Downloads"
export XDG_MUSIC_DIR="/home/user/Music"
export XDG_PICTURES_DIR="/home/user/Pictures"
export XDG_PUBLICSHARE_DIR="/home/user/Public"
export XDG_STATE_HOME="/home/user/.local/state"
export XDG_TEMPLATES_DIR="/home/user/Templates"
export XDG_VIDEOS_DIR="/home/user/Videos"
export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$HOME/.cache/.bun/bin${PATH:+:}$PATH"
